## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's Statement of Work (SOW) and discuss potential partnership strategy with Tribble.](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tribble is evaluating agency partnerships pre-Series A, with pricing and timing as key considerations](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive team (9K/mo) with rapid deployment and expertise across content strategy, creation, and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Ajay is seeking ammunition to convince Tribble leadership of GrowthX's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide a 12-week engagement outline and competitor analysis to support Tribble's decision-making process](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

## Topics

### Tribble's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Approaching Series A funding round in 1-1.5 months](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Planning to add marketing and growth team members post-funding](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Evaluating timing for starting a content engine](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Seeking justification for $9K/month investment in GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### GrowthX's Value Proposition

  - [Comprehensive team including managing director, managing editor, and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Expertise from industry veterans (e.g., Fanatics, TripAdvisor, Semrush)](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Rapid deployment compared to hiring and onboarding in-house (weeks vs. months)](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Access to specialized tools and workflows for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Commitment to 50,000 words of published content per month](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Capability to create visual assets, including AI-generated images](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Focus on building foundational content first](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Develop editorial and programmatic strategies](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Create content roadmap based on topical opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Refine strategy through feedback loops and data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Potential for expanding into social content (e.g., LinkedIn) as engagement progresses](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Technical Requirements and Setup

  - [GrowthX has experience with various CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow, Framer, Contentful, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Minimal access requirements: Google Search Console, Analytics, and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Can assist with CMS selection and migration if needed](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Ability to work with static sites and implement technical SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Engagement Process

  - [Documented 12-week kickoff process](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Initial research on personas and jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [In-depth kickoff call to understand goals, objectives, and product](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Development of Content OS (operating system) to guide topic selection and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Iterative feedback and refinement of content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to share 12-week engagement outline and competitor analysis via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Ajay to present information to Tribble CEO for approval](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up sync with Bruno for Thursday or Friday of the current week](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a quick analysis of Tribble's competitors and potential content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/iVnuTuSQe8evFA4qbFnvXeP3Sj78H341?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
